title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 305.020 - Ownership of space
text:
305.020.  Ownership of space. — The ownership of the space above the lands and waters of this state is declared to be vested in the several owners of the surface beneath, subject to the right of flight described in section 305.030.
(RSMo 1939 § 15107) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 13906
